name: Fresh Cherry Pie with a Buttery Cream Cheese Crust
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
3 cups Fresh pitted cherries
2 1/2 tablespoons Minute tapioca
1/8 teaspoon Salt
6 tablespoons Granulated sugar
1/4 teaspoon Almond extract
Cream together butter and cream cheese with a mixer until thoroughly blended. Using a pastry blender, cut in flour until it looks like it may hold together if you squeezed some of it into a ball. Stop mixing when the dough appears to be ready (if overmixed, it will become tough). Chill well.
When chilled, divide the dough in half. Use one half to pat into a 9-inch glass pie dish. Chill again.
Filling: Combine all filling ingredients and let stand for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, use the reserved dough between two sheets of waxed paper. Roll out until large enough for the top crust.
Pour cherry filling into the pie dish and top with rolled dough. Make attractive slits and bake at 400°F for about 40 minutes.
